plugins.name: llm-observability
plugins.description: 16 ready-to-use skills for LLM observability: instrument tracing, evals, eval datasets, eval-driven dev, trace-based testing, debug from traces, reduce cost, RAG quality, hallucination detection, model comparison, multi-agent tracing, guardrails, red-teaming, drift alerts, PII-safe tracing, and tool selection.
